description_long: This is a modern utility or tactical knife featuring a straight-edged blade with a sharp, angular tip, likely designed for precision cutting or piercing tasks. The blade is single-edged and appears to be made of metal, with a matte or semi-glossy finish. The handle is skeletonized with cut-out sections, reducing weight and providing a distinctive, ergonomic grip. The handle is also metallic, matching the blade, and lacks any visible wrapping or additional grip material. There is no visible guard or crossguard separating the blade from the handle, giving it a streamlined, minimalist appearance. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban or outdoor use.
description: A modern, straight-edged utility knife with a skeletonized metal handle and an angular, single-edged blade. The design is sleek, minimal, and functional.
description_view_0: The knife is seen from the tip, showing the narrow, pointed blade and the slim profile of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the straight-edged blade and the skeletonized handle with cut-out sections.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the handle's width and the alignment of the blade with the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the blade's straight edge and the open, lightweight handle structure.
attribute_handle_design: skeletonized, contoured metal handle with open cut-outs, no visible grip material
